User.title: User
User.description: A user profile in the Bloomrix app.

id.description: The unique ID of the user.

name.description: The display name of the user.

avatar.description: The avatar URL of the user.

workspaces.description: IDs of workspaces the user is a member of.

Workspace.title: Workspace
Workspace.description: A workspace in the Bloomrix app.

id.description: The unique ID of the workspace.

color.description: The background color of the workspace icon.

initial.description: The initial letter of the workspace name.

Channel.title: Channel
Channel.description: A chat channel in the Bloomrix app.

id.description: The unique ID of the channel.

createdBy.description: The ID of the user who created the channel.

workspaceId.description: The ID of the workspace this channel belongs to.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A message sent in a channel or direct message.

id.description: The unique ID of the message.

senderId.description: The ID of the user who sent the message.

content.description: The text content of the message.

channelId.description: The ID of the channel (if it's a channel message).

receiverId.description: The ID of the receiver (if it's a direct message).

timestamp.description: The time the message was sent.

fileUrl.description: The URL of an attached file.

fileName.description: The name of an attached file.

threadId.description: The ID of the parent message (if it's a reply).
